=== YAML MANIFEST ===
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: api-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  containers:
  - name: api
    image: myapp:1.2.3
    resources:
      requests:
        memory: "64Mi"
        cpu: "250m"
status:
  phase: Running
  conditions:
  - type: Ready
    status: "True"

=== EVENTS ===
Name:         api-server
Namespace:    default
Events:
  Type    Reason     Age   From               Message
  ----    ------     ----  ----               -------
  Normal  Scheduled  5m    default-scheduler  Successfully assigned default/api-server
  Normal  Pulled     5m    kubelet            Container image already present
  Warning BackOff    1m    kubelet            Back-off restarting failed container api

=== LOGS ===
2024-01-01T12:00:00Z INFO  Starting application
2024-01-01T12:00:01Z INFO  Listening on :8080
2024-01-01T12:00:05Z WARN  Database connection slow (latency=2.3s)
2024-01-01T12:00:10Z ERROR Failed to connect to database: connection refused
2024-01-01T12:00:10Z FATAL Unrecoverable error, shutting down
